LanguageData.PTCombatPrecognition.description: Combat precognition is a technique that allows a psion to predict an adversary's movement before it happens, making them better at evading and blocking attacks.
LanguageData.PTCombatInsight.description: Combat insight is a technique that allows a psion to more easily see an adversary's weaknesses, making them more effective at penetrating armor and dealing critical blows.
